anti_patterns.title: AI-indigo/purple 135deg gradient hero
anti_patterns.do_not: Use the familiar blue-to-purple or purple-to-pink 135-degree gradient as a substitute for a portfolio's visual point of view.

good_bad.good: A project preview uses work-specific imagery, typography, or material treatment.
good_bad.bad: A 135deg blue/purple hero gradient supplies the whole identity.

anti_patterns.title: Template cards hide the creator's role
anti_patterns.do_not: Show projects as interchangeable cards without clarifying contribution, constraint, or outcome.

anti_patterns.title: Motion delays access to the work
anti_patterns.do_not: Make visitors wait through decorative motion before they can inspect the actual projects.
